full_implementation:
func getHash(t string) hash.Hash {
	var h hash.Hash
	switch t {
	case "md5":
		h = md5.New()
	case "sha1":
		h = sha1.New()
	case "sha224":
		h = sha256.New224()
	case "sha256":
		h = sha256.New()
	case "sha384":
		h = sha512.New384()
	case "sha512":
		h = sha512.New()
	}
	return h
}

vulnerability_info.Message: MD5 - RFC 9155 - Deprecating MD5 Signature Hashes in TLS 1.2 and DTLS 1.2. Use MD5 in HMAC is Acceptable But Not Recommended

vulnerability_info.Message: SHA-224 - NIST 800-57 : In 2031 and beyond, SHA-224 shall not be used for applying cryptographic protection.
